tasksCompleted: 3.1.1 — Fix 6 syntax errors (extra closing parentheses) in submit.go and test_promote.go; added missing return nil to saveIndexAndSignalCompletion

3.1.2 — Add cobra Args validation (cobra.NoArgs) to 9 commands: rootCmd, configCmd, configInitCmd, taskCmd, e2eCmd, forensicCmd, promptCmd, worktreeCmd, worktreeListCmd; claudeCmd excluded due to DisableFlagParsing

3.1.3 — Unify command output with PrintBlock/PrintField/PrintWarning/PrintListItem helpers across 7 files; replace os.Exit calls with return nil/error in verify_task_done.go and quality_gate.go; fix build issues (missing returns, unused imports, duplicate return nil)
3.2 — Delete bufio config init code path; delegate forge config init to huh TUI via runConfigInitHuh wrapper; simplify config_test.go with configInitFunc override pattern
3.3 — Add SetConfigValue in pkg/forgeconfig/config.go with dot-notation key dispatch; wire forge config set CLI command; refactor getAutoKeyValue to generic field dispatch; 82.5% test coverage

3.4 — Add Version field (int, omitempty, default 1) to Config struct; sync enum values between schema JSON and Go const block (fullstack/mobile/library/mixed); update forge-config.example.yaml project-type from frontend to fullstack
keyDecisions: [3.1.1] Removed extra closing parentheses from 6 NewAIError calls that prevented go build from passing; added missing return nil in saveIndexAndSignalCompletion

[3.1.2] claudeCmd excluded from Args validation because DisableFlagParsing:true requires transparent passthrough of all arguments to the claude binary; parent/group commands all got cobra.NoArgs to prevent accidental positional argument usage
[3.1.3] Used PrintListItem for indented list items instead of raw fmt.Printf; os.Exit(0) in RunE functions replaced with return nil; os.Exit(2) in verify_task_done.go replaced with return error

[3.2] Added runConfigInitHuh wrapper that delegates to configInitFunc (same variable used by forge init); simplified config_test.go to use configInitFunc override pattern like init_test.go; all 7 auto fields confirmed exposed in askAutoBehavior()

[3.3] SetConfigValue uses dot-notation key dispatch similar to GetConfigValue approach; getAutoKeyValue refactored from repetitive switch to generic field dispatch using autoModeField helper; auto.{field} (ModeToggle) sets both quick and full to same bool value
[3.4] Version field uses omitempty tag for backward compatibility with default 1; ValidProjectType validation function restricts to fullstack/mobile/library/mixed (removed frontend and backend)

typesAndInterfacesChanged.file: forge-cli/internal/cmd/root.go, config.go, task_parent.go, e2e_parent.go, forensic.go, prompt_parent.go, worktree.go
typesAndInterfacesChanged.change: Added .Args validator fields (cobra.NoArgs) to 9 command definitions
Fixed 6 malformed NewAIError calls with extra closing parentheses

typesAndInterfacesChanged.file: forge-cli/internal/cmd/query.go, check_deps.go, verify_task_done.go, quality_gate.go, forensic.go, test.go, reopen.go
typesAndInterfacesChanged.change: Applied PrintListItem/PrintField/PrintWarning helpers; removed raw fmt.Printf and os.Exit calls
Deleted bufio-based init; replaced with runConfigInitHuh wrapper
New exported function with dot-notation key dispatch for setting config values
New int field with omitempty tag; defaults to 1 for backward compatibility
New field with ValidProjectType validation function; valid values: fullstack, mobile, library, mixed
Synced enum values to match Go const block (fullstack/mobile/library/mixed)
Changed project-type from frontend to fullstack

conventionsEstablished: All cobra commands must have appropriate .Args validators (NoArgs for group/parent commands, specific validators for leaf commands); DisableFlagParsing commands are exempt
Command output must use PrintBlock formatting helpers (PrintListItem, PrintField, PrintWarning) instead of raw fmt.Printf
os.Exit() must not be called in RunE functions — use return nil for success or return error for failure
Config initialization flows must go through huh TUI, not bufio scanner; all 7 auto fields must be exposed in interactors
Config set uses dot-notation key dispatch with autoModeField helper for generic field access
New Config struct fields should use omitempty tag for backward compatibility with existing config files
Schema JSON enum and Go const block enums must be kept in sync — single source of truth for project types
Version field defaults to 1 for configs without the field, ensuring no breaking change for existing users
deviationsFromDesign: PrintBlock formatting was applied to 7 files (not just query.go and check_deps.go as the tech-design primarily mentioned) — forensic.go, test.go, reopen.go, verify_task_done.go, and quality_gate.go also needed formatting cleanup during the unified formatting pass
Config CRUD (3.3) closely followed Interface 4 in the tech-design with no significant deviations; the autoModeField helper refactoring was an implementation improvement not specified in the design
Schema version/enum task (3.4) was simpler than anticipated because Version and ProjectType fields were already partially implemented in the working tree before the task started

The tech-design described project-type enums as fullstack/mobile/library/mixed, but did not explicitly specify removing frontend/backend — this was discovered during implementation as a necessary alignment step
